/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/Brusher_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/src/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/src/canvas/CanvasWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/src/tools/PenTool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/src/tools/EraserTool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/src/tools/FillTool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/src/tools/EyedropperTool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/src/tools/LineTool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/src/ui/panels/ToolPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/src/ui/panels/ColorPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/src/ui/panels/LayerPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/src/ui/dialogs/NewProjectDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Brusher.dir/Brusher_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o Brusher  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Svg.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
